Operation 'findDropPoints' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary and description are too generic. data.current_description: Locate pickup points based on geolocation
data.summary_suggestion: Search for available drop points by location
data.description_suggestion: Searches for available drop points (pickup/delivery locations) based on geolocation parameters. Accepts location coordinates or address as input filters. Returns a collection of drop points with details including address, operating hours, and service capabilities. Useful for presenting carrier drop point options to end customers.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too generic. Added clarity about what drop points are, what input parameters are expected (geolocation/address), what the response contains, and the use case context. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

Enhanced to clarify return structure, what information is included, and the use case for retrieving webhooks. Helps AI agents understand the response format and when this operation is needed.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a collection of all configured webhooks for the authenticated account. Returns webhook details including endpoint URLs, subscribed event types, and configuration status. Useful for auditing active event subscriptions and managing webhook integrations.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about what webhook details are returned and the operational context. Enhanced to clarify return structure, what information is included, and the use case for retrieving webhooks. Helps AI agents understand the response format and when this operation is needed.

message: Operation 'createWebhook' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is vague about inputs and outputs. Enhanced to specify required parameters (endpoint URL, event types), clarify the mechanism (POST requests to endpoint), describe the return value, and explicitly document side effects (immediate event delivery). This enables AI agents to understand what configuration is needed and what to expect after creation.

data.summary_suggestion: Create a new webhook event subscription
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new webhook subscription to receive event notifications. Requires endpoint URL and event types to subscribe to. The API will send POST requests to the specified endpoint when subscribed events occur. Returns the created webhook object with a unique identifier and configuration details. Side effects: The webhook endpoint will begin receiving event notifications immediately upon creation.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about inputs and outputs. Enhanced to specify required parameters (endpoint URL, event types), clarify the mechanism (POST requests to endpoint), describe the return value, and explicitly document side effects (immediate event delivery). This enables AI agents to understand what configuration is needed and what to expect after creation.

message: Operation 'listOrders' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks details about pagination parameters, filtering capabilities, and what the response contains. Enhanced version clarifies pagination support, return structure (OrderCollection), and use cases for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Retrieve a paginated list of orders
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a paginated list of orders with optional filtering and sorting. Supports pagination parameters to control result set size and offset. Returns an OrderCollection containing order objects with their current status, shipment details, and metadata. Use this operation to view all orders or filter by specific criteria.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks details about pagination parameters, filtering capabilities, and what the response contains. Enhanced version clarifies pagination support, return structure (OrderCollection), and use cases for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'createOrder' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is acceptable but description lacks critical details. Missing information about what OrderRequest should contain, the response structure, HTTP status code, and that the order ID is generated for future reference. Enhanced description helps AI agents understand the complete workflow and what to expect.

data.current_description: Create a new order for shipment
data.description_suggestion: Create a new order for shipment processing. Accepts an OrderRequest containing shipment details such as origin, destination, items, and service preferences. Returns a 201 Created response with the newly created Order object including a unique order ID and initial status. The order is immediately available for shipment booking and rate quoting. Subsequent operations can reference this order ID.
data.reasoning: Summary is acceptable but description lacks critical details. Missing information about what OrderRequest should contain, the response structure, HTTP status code, and that the order ID is generated for future reference. Enhanced description helps AI agents understand the complete workflow and what to expect.

message: Operation 'listShipments' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details. Similar to listOrders, summary is too generic and description lacks specificity. Missing details about pagination support, filtering capabilities, and response structure (ShipmentCollection). Enhanced version clarifies what data is returned and helps AI agents understand filtering and pagination options.

data.current_description: Retrieve a paginated list of shipments
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a paginated list of shipments with optional filtering. Supports pagination parameters to control result set size and offset. Returns a ShipmentCollection containing shipment objects with carrier information, tracking details, status, and associated order references. Use this operation to view all shipments or filter by specific criteria such as status or date range.
data.reasoning: Similar to listOrders, summary is too generic and description lacks specificity. Missing details about pagination support, filtering capabilities, and response structure (ShipmentCollection). Enhanced version clarifies what data is returned and helps AI agents understand filtering and pagination options.

message: Operation 'createShipment' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is acceptable but description is incomplete. Missing details about ShipmentRequest structure, what carrier booking entails, the response structure, and generated tracking information. Enhanced description clarifies the booking process and helps AI agents understand the shipment lifecycle and what data is returned.

data.current_description: Create a new shipment with carrier booking
data.description_suggestion: Create a new shipment with automatic carrier booking. Accepts a ShipmentRequest containing order reference, carrier selection, service level, and delivery preferences. Initiates carrier booking and generates tracking information. Returns the created Shipment object with carrier confirmation, tracking number, estimated delivery date, and shipment status. The shipment is immediately available for tracking and status monitoring.
data.reasoning: Summary is acceptable but description is incomplete. Missing details about ShipmentRequest structure, what carrier booking entails, the response structure, and generated tracking information. Enhanced description clarifies the booking process and helps AI agents understand the shipment lifecycle and what data is returned.
